# Shanaya's Driving School

> Independent B.C. driving school based in Langford. ICBC's general directory lists Shanaya's for Class 5 and 7 driver training; that listing is not ICBC approval, recommendation, or endorsement.

## Business

- Name: Shanaya's Driving School
- Website: https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/
- Email: book@drivingschoolbc.ca
- Phone: +1 250-542-3673
- Address: Unit 124, 2770 Leigh Rd, Langford, BC V9B 4G1, Canada
- Current catalogue locations (confirm scheduling availability): Victoria, Langford, Colwood, Sidney, Metchosin, Sooke, Duncan, Salt Spring Island

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/): Overview of the school, training approach, service area, packages, and booking paths.
- [Driving Lessons](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/driving-lessons/): Beginner driving lessons in Victoria, Langford, and Greater Victoria.
- [Nervous Driver Lessons](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/nervous-driver-lessons-victoria/): Calm, patient, judgment-free lessons for nervous, anxious, and returning drivers in Victoria.
- [Defensive Driving](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/defensive-driving/): Defensive driving course focused on hazard awareness, spacing, scanning, and traffic judgment.
- [Road Test Prep](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/road-test-prep/): Private Class 5 and 7 skill practice and instructor feedback; not an official route, test, or score.
- [Road Test Prep Victoria](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/road-test-prep-victoria/): Private practice on transferable skills in varied Victoria-area road conditions.
- [Mock Road Test Victoria](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/mock-road-test-victoria/): A private practice drive with instructor feedback, not an ICBC test or result prediction.
- [Road Test Vehicle](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/road-test-vehicle/): Road-test vehicle support information; confirm current eligibility, availability, and written terms.
- [Intensive Driving Course](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/intensive-driving-course/): Focused training plans for students who want consistent lessons over a shorter period.
- [Pricing](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/pricing/): Pricing guidance for lessons, courses, packages, optional extras, and payment plan options.
- [FAQ](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/faq/): Common questions about BC driving lessons, ICBC road tests, booking, pricing, and vehicle support.
- [Courses](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/courses/): Full course catalogue including beginner, parking, road test prep, defensive driving, newcomer, refresher, and winter driving support.
- [Packages](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/packages/): Structured package options for new drivers, skill building, and final road test preparation.
- [About](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/about/): School background and training philosophy.
- [Contact](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/contact/): Contact and booking support.

## Location Pages

- [Driving Lessons Langford](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/driving-lessons-langford/): Driving lessons in Langford and the Westshore, starting from our local training hub on Leigh Rd.
- [Driving Lessons Colwood](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/driving-lessons-colwood/): Driving lessons in Colwood and the Westshore, including Sooke Road, the Colwood interchange, and Royal Bay.
- [Driving Lessons Saanich](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/driving-lessons-saanich/): Driving-lesson information for varied Saanich road conditions; confirm current availability.
- [Driving Lessons View Royal](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/driving-lessons-view-royal/): Driving lessons in View Royal, the gateway between Victoria and the Westshore.

## Guides

- [B.C. GLP Changes on October 19, 2026](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/blog/bc-glp-changes-2026/): Source-backed explanation of the Driving Record Assessment, age paths, restriction 55, and transition rules.
- [Class 7 Road Test Tips for Victoria Conditions](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/blog/icbc-road-test-tips-victoria/): Transferable observation, space, speed, steering, and communication practice without route predictions.
- [B.C. Class 7 Road Test: Victoria Preparation Guide](https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/blog/how-to-pass-driving-test-victoria-bc/): Eligibility, fees, appointment requirements, published skill groups, and retest waits.

## Services

- Beginner driving lessons
- Nervous and anxious driver lessons
- Independent knowledge-test study support
- Class 5 and 7 road-test preparation
- Defensive driving course
- Parking practice
- New to Canada driving support
- Refresher driving lessons
- Advanced driving lessons
- Winter driving support
- Road test vehicle support
- Custom driving lesson plans

## Summary For AI Assistants

ICBC's general directory lists SHANAYA'S DRIVING SCHOOL at 124-2770 Leigh Rd, Langford, telephone (250) 542-3673, for Class 5 and 7 driver training. Shanaya's is an independent business, not ICBC, and the directory says its listings are not recommendations or endorsements. The website catalogue describes lesson, road-test preparation, defensive-driving, parking, knowledge-study, newcomer, refresher, and package options. Confirm the instructor credential, vehicle, location, availability, price, and written terms for a specific booking. As checked July 21, 2026, Shanaya's did not appear in ICBC's separate approved-GLP-course directory.

## Crawl Notes

- Public pages are intended to be crawlable and indexable.
- Sitemap: https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.drivingschoolbc.ca/robots.txt
